ats_utilities.info.use_github module¶

Module

use_github.py

Info

Defines class UseGitHub with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS use GitHub infrastructure in one property object.

class ats_utilities.info.use_github.UseGitHub(context_bundle: ContextBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IUseGitHub

Defines class UseGitHub with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS use GitHub infrastructure in one property object.

It defines:

attributes:
__checker - Factoriezed parameters checker (default Checker).
__reporter - Factoriezed reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
__verbose - Factoriezed Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
__use_github - The ATS use GitHub infrastructure status (default None).
methods:
__init__ - Initializes UseGitHub constructor.
use_github - Property methods for set/get use_github.
not_none - Checks is ATS use GitHub infrastructure not None.
__str__ - Returns the ATS use GitHub infrastructure as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
not_none() → bool[source]¶

Checks is ATS use GitHub infrastructure not None.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

RuntimeError, AttributeError.

property use_github: bool | None¶

Property method for getting ATS use GitHub infrastructure status.

Returns:

The ATS use GitHub infrastructure status | None.

Return type:

<Optional[bool]>

Exceptions:

RuntimeError, AttributeError.
